Order Custom Signicade A-Frame Signs for Business Storefronts

The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Kit is the ultimate solution for outdoor business advertising, featuring durable hardware and two vibrant 36" x 24" full-color custom signs. This weather-resistant, maintenance-free plastic A-frame is designed for maximum stability in outdoor conditions.

Each kit includes molded handles for easy transport, making setup and relocation effortless for busy storefronts and business locations. The coroplast signs are digitally printed with your custom design and built to withstand outdoor weather conditions.

Perfect for restaurants, retail stores, service businesses, and any storefront needing professional outdoor signage. The kit comes complete with everything needed for immediate installation and display.

For custom double-sided printed signs or special sizing requirements, contact our customer service team for personalized assistance with your A-frame sign project.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Coroplast Material for Durable A-Frame Sign Displays

Your Signicade Deluxe A-Frame kit includes premium black hardware and two 36" x 24" custom printed signs made from high-quality materials designed for outdoor business use.

4mm Coroplast Sign Material

Our standard material option features 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast) that delivers exceptional durability for outdoor A-frame displays:

  • Waterproof Construction: Complete weather resistance for year-round outdoor use
  • Lightweight Design: Easy handling and transport while maintaining structural integrity
  • Digital Print Quality: Vibrant, full-color graphics printed directly onto the coroplast surface
  • UV Resistant: Fade-resistant inks maintain color vibrancy in direct sunlight
  • Impact Resistant: Durable plastic construction withstands wind and weather

The coroplast material is specifically chosen for A-frame applications due to its perfect balance of durability, weight, and print quality. This ensures your business signage looks professional while standing up to daily outdoor conditions.

Request a free sample packet to feel the quality of our coroplast material before placing your A-frame sign order.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Signicade A-Frame Hardware & Finishing Options

Your A-frame sign kit includes professional-grade hardware and finishing options designed for reliable outdoor business use.

Deluxe A-Frame Hardware Features

  • Durable Black Frame: Weather-resistant plastic construction for long-lasting outdoor use
  • Molded Carry Handles: Built-in handles for easy transport and repositioning
  • Stable Base Design: Low center of gravity prevents tipping in moderate wind conditions
  • Easy Sign Installation: Tool-free sign insertion and removal system
  • Maintenance-Free: No painting or special care required

Sign Finishing Specifications

  • Full-Color Digital Printing: Vibrant graphics printed with UV-resistant inks
  • Precision Cut: Each 36" x 24" sign cut to exact specifications for perfect frame fit
  • Smooth Edges: Professional finishing with no sharp edges
  • Double-Sided Options: Contact customer service for custom double-sided printing

The combination of premium hardware and professional sign finishing ensures your A-frame display represents your business with a polished, professional appearance that attracts customers and withstands daily use.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom A-Frame Sign Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production timeframes for your custom A-frame signs, allowing you to choose the turnaround that best fits your business timeline and budget.

2 Business Days Express Production

Need your A-frame signs quickly? Our express option delivers professional results on an accelerated timeline.

  • Ideal for urgent business openings or events
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day rushes available in select cases
  • Production time plus shipping time determines total delivery

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option offers the perfect balance of speed and value for most A-frame sign projects.

  • Most popular choice for custom A-frame orders
  • Provides adequate time for quality control and finishing
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Includes full quality inspection before shipping

5 Business Days Saver Production

Choose extended production time for cost savings when your timeline allows for additional processing days.

  • Most economical production option available
  • Perfect for planned business signage updates
  • Same quality standards with extended timeline
  • Allows for detailed review and approval process

Important Notes: Turnaround begins when file upload is complete. Orders requiring prepress corrections or proof approvals start production timing from approval confirmation. Total delivery time includes both production and shipping duration.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Signicade A-Frame Payment & Ordering Options

All custom Signicade Deluxe A-Frame orders require payment prior to production to ensure your signs enter our printing queue immediately upon artwork approval.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received and cleared before production begins
  • Secure Processing: All payments processed through encrypted, secure systems

Payment Processing Timeline

We will not charge your credit card until you have reviewed and approved your A-frame sign order. This ensures you have the opportunity to verify:

  • Sign artwork and layout accuracy
  • Hardware color and specifications
  • Production timeline selection
  • Shipping address and method

Check Payment Information

Business customers preferring check payment can mail payment upon order placement. Your A-frame signs will enter production once check payment is received and cleared. Learn more about check payment processing for detailed instructions.

For large orders or special pricing arrangements, contact our customer service team to discuss payment terms and bulk pricing options for multiple A-frame sign kits.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom A-Frame Sign Delivery

We provide reliable shipping options for your custom A-frame signs with tracking information and delivery confirmation for every order.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy Shipping: 5-10 business days (most economical option)
  • Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days (most popular choice)
  • Three Day: 3 business days guaranteed
  • Two Day: 2 business days guaranteed
  • Overnight: Next business day delivery

Shipping Guidelines & Policies

  • Tracking Numbers: Provided once your A-frame package ships
  • Pricing: Determined by package weight and destination
  • Large Orders: Additional charges may apply for oversized shipments
  • Damage Claims: Damaged goods must be returned for replacement

Economy Shipping Special Notes

When selecting economy shipping for your A-frame signs, include additional postal information such as P.O. Box numbers in the "Address Two" field during checkout to ensure successful delivery.

International Shipping

International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We currently accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS only. Contact our customer service team for specific international shipping requirements.

Shipping Company Terms: Once shipped, all carrier terms and conditions apply. We will replace damaged goods upon return and confirmed loss after carrier investigation (typically 7-10 business days).

Questions about shipping your A-frame signs? Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business & Storefront Uses for Signicade A-Frame Signs

Custom Signicade A-Frame signs provide versatile outdoor advertising solutions for businesses across all industries. The portable design and weather-resistant construction make these signs perfect for various commercial applications.

Retail & Storefront Applications

  • Sale Announcements: Promote seasonal sales, clearances, and special offers
  • Store Hours: Display current operating hours and holiday schedules
  • New Arrivals: Highlight fresh inventory and featured products
  • Directional Signage: Guide customers to entrances, parking, and departments

Restaurant & Food Service

  • Daily Specials: Advertise menu changes and chef's recommendations
  • Happy Hour: Promote drink specials and dining promotions
  • Outdoor Seating: Indicate patio availability and outdoor dining options
  • Takeout Services: Display delivery and pickup information

Professional Services

  • Office Hours: Communicate availability and appointment scheduling
  • Service Offerings: Highlight specialties and professional capabilities
  • Contact Information: Display phone numbers and website details
  • Parking Instructions: Direct clients to designated parking areas

Seasonal & Event Marketing

  • Holiday Promotions: Feature seasonal products and gift services
  • Special Events: Advertise grand openings, workshops, and community events
  • Weather Updates: Communicate closures or modified services
  • COVID Guidelines: Display health protocols and safety measures

The 36" x 24" size provides excellent visibility for pedestrian and vehicle traffic while maintaining easy portability for daily setup and storage. Perfect for businesses needing flexible signage that moves with changing promotions and seasons.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Artwork Requirements for Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures your custom A-frame signs print with sharp detail and accurate colors. Our graphic design team provides support throughout the artwork process.

Preferred File Formats

  • Vector Files (.eps): Best print quality with fonts converted to outlines
  • High-Resolution PDF: Minimum 300 DPI for sharp text and images
  • JPEG Files: High-resolution images at 300 DPI or higher
  • TIFF Files: Professional format for complex graphics

File Size & Upload Guidelines

  • Maximum File Size: 60 MB through online upload system
  • Large Files: Call for special instructions on files exceeding 60 MB
  • Multiple Files: Upload logos, images, and text separately if needed

Design Specifications for A-Frame Signs

  • Dimensions: 36" x 24" finished size (specify orientation)
  • Resolution: Minimum 150 DPI, recommended 300 DPI
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed Area: Include 0.25" bleed beyond trim lines
  • Text Size: Minimum 1" height for optimal readability

Artwork Approval Process

Order Proofs: Request a proof to review artwork layout, order details, pricing, and shipping information before production begins. Your A-frame signs will not enter production until you approve the proof.

Color Matching: For color-critical projects, utilize our Color Match Proof System to ensure accurate color reproduction. Contact customer service for color matching requirements.

Professional Design Services

Need design assistance? Our professional graphic designers can help create your A-frame sign artwork. Upload reference images, logos, or text, and provide specific instructions for our design team.

Unsure about your file quality? Our prepress team reviews all artwork and will contact you if files require adjustment before printing your custom A-frame signs.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom Signicade A-Frame Signs Today

Transform your business visibility with professional custom Signicade A-Frame signs that attract customers and communicate your message effectively. Each complete kit includes durable black hardware and two full-color 36" x 24" signs printed on weather-resistant coroplast material.

Complete A-Frame Sign Package Includes:

  • Premium black Signicade Deluxe hardware with molded handles
  • Two custom-printed 36" x 24" coroplast signs
  • Weather-resistant construction for year-round outdoor use
  • Easy setup with no tools required
  • Professional full-color digital printing

Why Choose Our A-Frame Sign Solution?

  • Complete Package: Everything included for immediate use
  • Professional Quality: Premium materials and printing technology
  • Fast Turnaround: Production options from 2-5 business days
  • Expert Support: In-house customer service and design team
  • Proven Durability: Designed for daily commercial use

Perfect for restaurants, retail stores, professional offices, and any business needing portable, professional outdoor signage. The lightweight design allows for easy daily setup while the durable construction ensures long-lasting performance.

Ready to create your custom A-frame signs? Upload your artwork, choose your production timeline, and let our team deliver the professional signage solution your business deserves.

Need assistance with design or have questions about specifications? Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for personalized support with your A-frame sign project.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom A-Frame Signs

What's included with the Signicade Deluxe A-Frame kit?

Each kit includes one black Signicade Deluxe hardware unit with molded handles and two custom-printed 36" x 24" coroplast signs. The hardware is maintenance-free and designed for daily outdoor use.

Can I order double-sided signs for my A-frame?

Yes, double-sided printing is available for A-frame signs. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss double-sided options and pricing for your specific project.

How weather-resistant are the A-frame signs?

The coroplast signs are completely waterproof and UV-resistant, designed for year-round outdoor use. The black hardware is also weather-resistant and maintenance-free, requiring no special care or painting.

What file formats do you accept for A-frame sign artwork?

We accept .eps files (preferred with fonts outlined), high-resolution PDF files, JPEG files at 300 DPI or higher, and TIFF files. Maximum upload size is 60 MB through our online system.

How stable are these A-frames in wind conditions?

The Signicade Deluxe features a low center of gravity design for maximum stability in moderate wind conditions. For extreme weather areas, we recommend bringing signs indoors during severe weather events.

Can I replace just the signs without buying new hardware?

Yes, replacement signs are available separately if you want to change your message while keeping the existing hardware. The signs are designed for easy installation and removal.

What's the minimum text size for good readability?

For optimal readability from typical viewing distances, we recommend minimum text height of 1 inch. Larger text works better for vehicle traffic, while smaller text is suitable for pedestrian viewing.

Do you offer design services for A-frame signs?

Yes, our professional graphic designers can create your A-frame sign artwork. Simply upload any reference materials and provide specific instructions during the order process.

How long does shipping take for A-frame orders?

Shipping time depends on your chosen method: Economy (5-10 days), Standard (3-5 days), Three Day, Two Day, or Overnight. Total delivery time includes production time plus shipping time.

Can I get a proof before my A-frame signs are printed?

Yes, you can request an order proof that shows your artwork layout, order summary, and shipping information. Signs will not enter production until you approve the proof.
